name: Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi
summary: Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the purchase, sale, import, export, loading, unloading, storing, distribution, and filling facilities of petroleum and petroleum products. It is also involved in buying and selling paintings, sculptures, and similar artworks, as well as in related commercial activities. The company was formerly known as Cosmos Yatirim Ortakligi Anonim Sirketi and changed its name to Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi in December 2013. Cosmos Yatirim Holding Anonim Sirketi was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
